name: sheba-backend
description: Sheba (سبأ) is a national digital-government backend: one **modular monolith** that is both the country's **OpenID Connect / OAuth 2.1 Identity Provider** (OpenIddict) and its **government service gateway**. Citizens verified against the civil registry get an admin-approved digital identity and use it everywhere ("Sign in with Sheba" — think UAE Pass / Absher); ministries plug in as relying parties and as integration targets fulfilled through a credential vault, pluggable auth adapters, and a step-based service-request workflow engine.
